productDisplayName: Nike Men Dri-Fit Support Black Socks
description: Style Note Slip your feet into cosy comfort and up your running speed with ease in this socks from nike. Engineered with Dri-Fit technology, these socks offer exemplary comfort. Product Details Football socks (above knee length) made of polyester, nylon and spandex blended fabric Has a half cushion terry foot for exemplary comfort and shock absorption Inner arch support for a secure and stable fit Compression knit delivers a snug and secure fit during play Material and Care Polyester, nylon and spandex blend Machine wash cold at 30 degrees Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Do not iron or dry clean
